title: Jabba Tape
content:
{{Top|leg}}
[[File:Jabba_Tape.jpg|thumb|250px|The Jabba Tape talking to [[Gizman|Big Gizz]], [[Spiker]] and [[Onoh]].]]

The '''Jabba Tape''' was an artificially intelligent [[Hologram/Legends|holographic]] recording of [[Jabba Desilijic Tiure/Legends|Jabba Desilijic Tiure]] present on the ''[[Spirit of Jabba]]'', secretly hidden inside [[Glass Mountain]]. [[Gizman|Big Gizz]] and [[Spiker]] hijacked the ship and attempted to flee [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]] but the Jabba Tape took over and threatened to kill them. They were forced back into the atmosphere and were nearly shot down over [[Mos Eisley/Legends|Mos Eisley]] by [[Gorga Desilijic Aarrpo/Legends|Gorga Desilijic Aarrpo's]] men aboard the ''[[Nemphas]]''. The Jabba Tape refused to grant control without the proper authorization code, which was eventually entered by [[Onoh]].<ref name="The Jabba Tape">''[[The Jabba Tape]]''</ref>
